subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Mahdi, inasmuch as thou hast been enkindled with the fire of the Divine Lote-Tree and hast occupied thyself with the proclamation of thy Lord's Cause - this most exalted of all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نعیما لک یا مهدی بما اشتعلت بنار السدره و اشتغلت بتبلیغ امر ربک هذا اعظم کل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
